features: this deodorant spray delivers long-lasting odour protection
description: Product Description Adidas Power Booster Deodorant Spray is a dynamic and invigorating fragrance designed to elevate your confidence and keep you feeling energised throughout the day. Infused with a blend of bold, masculine scents and powerful odour-fighting technology, this deodorant spray provides long-lasting protection against body odour, keeping you fresh and dry no matter the situation. With its intense and captivating fragrance, featuring notes of spicy ginger, zesty citrus, and woody undertones, it leaves a lasting impression and exudes strength and vitality. Ingredients INGREDIENTS / INGREDIENTES: BUTANE-ISOBUTANE-PROPANE, ALUMINUM CHLOROHYDRATE, C12-15 ALKYL BENZOATE, ISODODECANE, PARFUM/FRAGRANCE, DIISOPROPYL ADIPATE, NEOPENTYL GLYCOL DIHEPTANOATE, DISTEARDIMONIUM HECTORITE, PROPYLENE CARBONATE, SODIUM STARCH OCTENYLSUCCINATE, MALTOSE, HEXYL CINNAMAL, POTASSIUM CITRATE, CITRIC ACID, SILICA DIMETHYL SILYLATE, BENZYL BENZOATE. Safety Warning For external use only See more
